temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with a pale, bald head and a distressed expression. He is wearing a dark, high-collared robe. The background is dark and filled with a swirling, ethereal blue and white energy that resembles lightning or a cosmic storm. In the top right corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The audio opens with a man letting out a sharp, pained grunt, filled with effort and distress. The camera pulls back to a wider shot, revealing the man in his entirety. He is kneeling on a dark, rocky surface, silhouetted against the bright, chaotic energy behind him. The energy continues to pulse and crackle in a massive, circular formation. The "风行网" text remains in the corner. This is immediately followed by a deep, resonant, and ominous musical score that swells with a sense of immense power and foreboding. The camera moves in for a close-up on the man's hand as he reaches for a dark, ornate wand. The wand is the central focus, held against the blurred, bright background of the energy storm. The "风行网" text is still present. The camera zooms in even closer, focusing tightly on the top of the wand. The intricate, textured, and dark design of the wand's tip fills the frame, with the surrounding blue and white light creating a dramatic, high-contrast effect. The "风行网" text is visible in the upper right. The music is layered with a low, rumbling sound and a high-pitched, ethereal whirring, creating a tense and magical atmosphere that suggests a powerful and dangerous event is unfolding. There is no narration or dialogue.
